.gitignore.general_idea: Add docker-volumes directory to gitignore to prevent committing local Docker volume data.
Exclude production environment file from gitignore to allow committing production-specific configuration.
Add OpenRewrite cache directory to gitignore to exclude generated migration tool artifacts.
Add Spring Boot Migrator log file to gitignore to exclude generated migration logs.

Makefile.general_idea: Comment out the inclusion of the .env file to prevent local environment variables from interfering with the new explicit variable definitions.
Define build and container metadata variables for consistent usage in Docker and Maven commands.
Add a target to display available dependency updates using the Maven Versions Plugin.
Add a target to automatically update dependencies to their latest versions using the Maven Versions Plugin.
Refactor the SonarQube analysis command to use environment variables for sensitive configuration and improve readability.
Add a target to build and push a specific CI/CD Docker image.
Makefile.after:
cicd:
	docker build \
		--tag sineverba/$(CONTAINER_NAME)-cicd:$(VERSION) \
		--file ./dockerfiles/cicd/Dockerfile \
		"."
	docker image push sineverba/$(CONTAINER_NAME)-cicd:$(VERSION)

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to build the production Docker image using a specific Dockerfile path.
Add a target to prepare the environment for multi-architecture Docker builds by installing buildx and binfmt.
Makefile.after:
preparemulti:
	mkdir -vp ~/.docker/cli-plugins
	curl -L "https://github.com/docker/buildx/releases/download/v$(BUILDX_VERSION)/buildx-v$(BUILDX_VERSION).linux-amd64" > ~/.docker/cli-plugins/docker-buildx
	chmod a+x ~/.docker/cli-plugins/docker-buildx
	docker buildx version
	docker run --rm --privileged tonistiigi/binfmt:$(BINFMT_VERSION) --install all
	docker buildx ls
	docker buildx rm multiarch
	docker buildx create --name multiarch --driver docker-container --use
	docker buildx inspect --bootstrap --builder multiarch

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to build multi-architecture Docker images (amd64 and arm64).
Add a target to spin up the application container with hardcoded environment variables for local testing.
Add a target to stop and remove the running application container.
Makefile.after:
stop:
	docker container stop $(CONTAINER_NAME)
	docker container rm $(CONTAINER_NAME)

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to clean up Docker images, specifically removing the built image and the JDK 17 base images.
Makefile.after:
destroy:
	docker image rm $(IMAGE_NAME):$(VERSION)
	docker image rm eclipse-temurin:17.0.7_7-jdk-jammy
	docker image rm eclipse-temurin:17.0.7_7-jre-jammy

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Remove the SonarQube service definition from the docker-compose configuration.
Update the MySQL Docker image version from 8.0.28 to 8.0.36.
Change the path for the MySQL initialization scripts volume mount to a new directory structure.
Add a missing newline at the end of the docker-compose file.
docker-compose.yml.before: driver: bridge\ No newline at end of file

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.3 to 3.1.9 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project targets Java 17, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 features/compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace mysql-connector-java with com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver compatible artifact or update version to support Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older MySQL connector versions may have compatibility issues with Java 21 or Spring Boot 3; explicit version pinning ensures stability.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Lombok version to 1.18.30 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or generate code correctly on Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-starter-validation dependency for Bean Validation support.
Add spring-boot-starter-data-jpa dependency for JPA data access.
Add spring-boot-starter-web dependency for web application support.
Add spring-cloud-starter-config dependency for configuration management.
Add H2 database dependency for in-memory database support.
Add spring-boot-starter-test dependency for testing support.
Add spring-security-test dependency for security testing.
Add modelmapper dependency for object mapping.
Add spring-boot-starter-security dependency for security features.
Add jjwt-api dependency for JWT handling.
Add jjwt-impl dependency for JWT implementation.
Add jjwt-jackson dependency for JWT Jackson serialization.
Add springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui dependency for OpenAPI documentation.
Add totp dependency for TOTP generation.
Add spring-milestone repository for accessing Spring Cloud milestones.
Add spring-milestone plugin repository for accessing Spring Cloud plugin milestones.
Update jacoco-maven-plugin version to 0.8.11 for Java 21 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may not support Java 21 bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update jaxb-api version to 2.4.0-b180830.0359 for compatibility.
Add maven-surefire-plugin configuration to handle test timeouts and classloader issues.
Add spring-cloud-dependencies BOM for managing Spring Cloud versions.

src/test/java/com/bitbank/OnlineBankingB.general_idea: Remove deprecated SpringExtension usage in favor of Spring Boot's auto-detection of JUnit 5 extensions.

src/test/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Configure H2 in-memory database to emulate MySQL behavior for tests.
Set Hibernate JDBC time zone to UTC to ensure consistent timestamp handling.
Add JWT secret key configuration for authentication tests.
Add JWT expiration time configuration for authentication tests.
Enable subscription feature flag in test environment.
Configure allowed origins for CORS in test environment.
Set root logging level to WARN to reduce test output noise.
Set application-specific logging level to WARN to reduce test output noise.
Disable Spring Cloud Config in tests to avoid external dependency.
Disable Open-in-View to prevent lazy loading issues and improve performance.
